ResearchProjectDef.label: replication
ResearchProjectDef.description: The foundational GTI breakthrough: persuading matter to politely copy itself. Equal parts transporter theory, voodoo, and a SCUMM script nobody on the team fully understands. Unlocks the basic principles of replication. Look behind you - a three-headed monkey!

ResearchProjectDef.label: resource replicator
ResearchProjectDef.description: Blueprints for the GTI Resource Replicator. Make it so, and never swing a pickaxe again. Steel, plasteel, components - if it built your colony, it can now build itself, twice over.

ResearchProjectDef.label: organic replicator
ResearchProjectDef.description: Blueprints for the GTI Organic Replicator. "Tea, Earl Grey, hot" - or a lavish dinner, if you've earned it. Brings food, crops and meals out of the pattern buffer, and quietly turns every mystery meat into honest beef.

ResearchProjectDef.label: medicinal replicator
ResearchProjectDef.description: Blueprints for the GTI Medicinal Replicator. Healing, pharmaceuticals, and a suspicious quantity of root beer, all conjured from a stored pattern. The GTI motto applies: "It probably won't kill you, and look behind you!"
